speaker: CAESAR
text: Go forth, Agrippa, and begin the fight.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Our will is Antony be took alive;

speaker: CAESAR
text: Make it so known.

speaker: AGRIPPA
text: Caesar, I shall.

speaker: CAESAR
text: The time of universal peace is near.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Prove this a prosp’rous day, the three-nooked world

speaker: CAESAR
text: Shall bear the olive freely.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Antony

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Is come into the field.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Go charge Agrippa

speaker: CAESAR
text: Plant those that have revolted in the vant

speaker: CAESAR
text: That Antony may seem to spend his fury

speaker: CAESAR
text: Upon himself.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Alexas did revolt and went to Jewry on

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Affairs of Antony, there did dissuade

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Great Herod to incline himself to Caesar

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: And leave his master Antony. For this pains,

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Caesar hath hanged him. Canidius and the rest

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: That fell away have entertainment but

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: No honorable trust. I have done ill,

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Of which I do accuse myself so sorely

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: That I will joy no more.

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Enobarbus, Antony

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Hath after thee sent all thy treasure, with

speaker: SOLDIER
text: His bounty overplus. The messenger

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Came on my guard, and at thy tent is now

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Unloading of his mules.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: I give it you.

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Mock not, Enobarbus.

speaker: SOLDIER
text: I tell you true. Best you safed the bringer

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Out of the host. I must attend mine office

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Or would have done ’t myself. Your emperor

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Continues still a Jove.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: I am alone the villain of the Earth,

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: And feel I am so most. O Antony,

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Thou mine of bounty, how wouldst thou have paid

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: My better service, when my turpitude

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Thou dost so crown with gold! This blows my heart.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: If swift thought break it not, a swifter mean

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Shall outstrike thought, but thought will do ’t, I feel.

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: I fight against thee? No. I will go seek

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: Some ditch wherein to die; the foul’st best fits

speaker: ENOBARBUS
text: My latter part of life.
